{"society_power": 8.0, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Dreyfus Affair mobilizes intellectuals; Ligue des droits de l'homme founded", "reasoning": "A booming mass press, organized labor, and the Dreyfus-era civic mobilization (birth of the \"intellectuals\" and the Ligue des droits de l'homme) push society further up, even as anarchist repression trims associational freedoms; the state consolidates its parliamentary institutions and colonial-military reach but is offset by the Panama scandal, Dreyfus cover-up, and Fashoda retreat, leaving state power roughly flat."}
